## Last-checked: 2026-06-21

# biotec-line

biotec-line is the bioinformatics branch of the Lukas Geiger / ellmos-ai ecosystem. It contains local-first Python desktop tools for direct-to-consumer DNA conversion, VCF 4.2 generation, VCF/gVCF processing, genetic variant annotation, FASTA reference validation, and research-grade variant workflows.

Canonical organization: https://github.com/biotec-line
Organization profile repository: https://github.com/biotec-line/.github
Related ecosystem entry points: https://github.com/research-line, https://github.com/ellmos-ai, https://github.com/lukisch
Public repository count: 3. Current public repositories: .github, VFDistiller, genotype-to-vcf. Private, internal, or unreleased work is intentionally excluded.

## Audience

Researchers, bioinformaticians, and technical users who need local-first tools for genetic variant workflows, DTC DNA conversion, and offline VCF processing. Not for clinical or diagnostic use.

## Public repository directory

- .github: https://github.com/biotec-line/.github
  Organization profile, shared community health files, issue templates, contribution guidelines, security policy, and machine-readable context for the public biotec-line GitHub start page.
- genotype-to-vcf: https://github.com/biotec-line/genotype-to-vcf
  Desktop and CLI app for converting DTC DNA raw data from providers such as 23andMe, MyHeritage, Family Tree DNA, Genes for Good, Mapmygenome, and tellmeGen into VCF 4.2. Uses PySide6, automatic GRCh37/GRCh38 build detection, sex-aware ploidy handling, dbSNP lookup, optional FASTA references, local cache, SHA256 release verification, and privacy-focused local file handling. Supports macOS and Linux via headless CLI mode.
- VFDistiller: https://github.com/biotec-line/VFDistiller
  Local-first VCF/gVCF and genetic variant annotation desktop application for research use only. Supports VCF, gVCF, 23andMe raw text, FASTA validation, gnomAD, MyVariant.info, Ensembl VEP, ALFA, TOPMed, ClinVar-oriented annotation fields, filtering, CSV/Excel/PDF/annotated-VCF export, dependency auditing, and cross-platform smoke tests (Windows, macOS, Linux).

## Positioning

- Local-first bioinformatics desktop software.
- Genetic data and generated VCF outputs stay on the user's own machine by default.
- Focus on DTC DNA conversion, VCF standardization, variant annotation, and research workflows.
- Not clinical software, not an in-vitro diagnostic medical device, not CE-IVD software, and not intended for diagnosis, prognosis, therapy decisions, or clinical interpretation.
- Built primarily in Python with PySide6, tkinter/ttkbootstrap, SQLite caches, dbSNP/FASTA integration, and documented ignored local data artifacts.
- Cross-platform CLI support: genotype-to-vcf runs headless on macOS and Linux for pipeline use.

## Search Phrases

```
biotec-line bioinformatics GitHub
biotec-line VCF tools
biotec-line DTC DNA to VCF
genotype-to-vcf 23andMe MyHeritage VCF converter
genotype-to-vcf GRCh37 GRCh38 dbSNP FASTA
genotype-to-vcf CLI headless pipeline
VFDistiller VCF annotation desktop app
VFDistiller gVCF filtering GUI
VFDistiller gnomAD FASTA variant review
local-first genetic variant annotation software
research use only VCF annotation tool
Windows bioinformatics desktop tool
biotec-line GitHub organization profile
local-first VCF annotation desktop app
DTC DNA raw data offline converter Python
SHA256 verified genetic data release
```
